case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. YUTONG LIN ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. IN SUPPORT OF WRIT OF POSSESSION/ $86.63 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES SERVED SEP-04-2019, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, YUTONG , AN INDIVIDUAL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, YUTONG , AN INDIVIDUAL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LIN, YUTONG , AN INDIVIDUAL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1190 MISSION STREET, UNIT NUMBER 1612, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT LIN, YUTONG , AN INDIVIDUAL DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS (ENDORSED RETURNDED IN SASE)

DECLARATION OF DAVID P. WASSERMAN, ESQ. RE COPY OF LEASE AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES
